ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incident_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "incident_id" TEXT /* ID of the incident the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_caption" TEXT /* Caption or description of the image */,
  "image_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was taken */,
  "image_source" TEXT /* Source of the image (e.g., police, public, CCTV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "incident_id" TEXT /* ID of the incident the video belongs to */,
  "video_path" TEXT /* File path to the video */,
  "video_caption" TEXT /* Caption or description of the video */,
  "video_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the video was recorded */,
  "video_source" TEXT /* Source of the video (e.g., police, public, CCTV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id")
)
column_names: ID of the incident the image belongs to
Caption or description of the image
Timestamp when the image was taken
Source of the image (e.g., police, public, CCTV)
ID of the incident the video belongs to
Caption or description of the video
Timestamp when the video was recorded
Source of the video (e.g., police, public, CCTV)
